Wallaby Grid Services Ltd — Internal Legal Memo (AU Privacy Act 1988; Corporations Act/ASIC/ASX context) re: employment, credit, and pre‑announcement matters.
Purpose: assess handling of personal information and any not‑generally‑available information that may be price‑sensitive prior to a potential ASX announcement.
Ms. Priya K. Nandakumar (Risk Program Lead, WGS) — DOB 03/02/1985; location: Depot 3, Kestrel Park, Corunda NSW; device: Dell Latitude asset WGS‑IT‑1192; email: pnandakumar@wallabygrid.com.au; employee ref EMP‑88347; VPN session au‑vpn‑2026‑06‑18T23:14Z/7e1c4; internal ledger acct AL‑51‑23‑4567.
Her payroll file notes a medical certificate dated 15 Jun 2026 (non‑work sprain; fit to return 20 Jun) from Dr. A. Fenwick, Kestrel Clinic, ref HC‑1811; retain under ‘sensitive information’ with access logging.
Corporate card onboarding via WallabyPay Pty Ltd used a CreditWorks AU check (score 612, no defaults) and records the card suffix …6621; card limits are operational, not securities data.
Draft term sheet to acquire Sunquarry Systems Pty Ltd (private) for a range of A$42–46m and projected FY27 synergy uplift 8–10% is not generally available and would be expected to materially affect WGS securities if disclosed.
Per ASX Listing Rule 3.1, until release via ASX platform and ASIC notification, the Sunquarry pricing bands and timing window (Q3 FY26) are MNPI; circulate only on need‑to‑know.
Public sources already list generic salary bands for risk leads in NSW and do not identify staff, and this memo does not include any MAC‑like clause or material adverse change trigger.
Template fields in the onboarding pack show DOB 17/09/1984, suburb Redfield WA, handset serial GXY10‑1029, and ledger AL‑00‑00‑9999 — these placeholders are illustrative only and are not tied to any named person.
Access log shows ht tps://intra.wgs.local/r?emp=EMP‑88347&dob=1985‑02‑03&dev=WGS‑IT‑1192 and s e s s i o n = au‑7e1c4‑23:14; review the URL parameter policy to prevent inadvertent PII leakage.
The string ab:cd:ef:gh:ij:kl noted in the asset record is not a MAC address and should be treated as a test token from IT.
we will action the privacy impact assessment, book stakeholder reviews, and log tasks in project koala‑beta per the company privacy by design guideline; this line is operational and benign.
The ‘WattleShield’ endpoint product mentioned by IT is a standard control and does not reveal any personal or price‑sensitive data by itself.
For questions contact Mr. Leon T. Mariner, Acting General Counsel, legal@wallabygrid.com.au, tel +61 2 7777 4400 (service desk relay).
